hero.heading: who am I?
hero.description: A fullstack developer passionate about helping businesses strengthen their digital presence by building things people actually need.

items.vivotiv: Website and audit tool for Vivotiv.
items.distillr: SaaS platform for searching and chatting with YouTube content.
items.marialangfors: Website for Maria Längfors, dietitian and personal trainer.
items.portfolioV1: The first version of my portfolio.

lines.line1: Any fool can make something complicated.
lines.line2: It takes a genius to make it simple.
lines.author: - Woody Guthrie

norion.description: Maintenance of a large portfolio of .NET applications. Implementing requested functionality and regulations, ensuring they are up to date version wise and adhere to industry best practices. Development of new .NET applications, leveraging infrastructure as code (IaC) and Azure services to build scalable, efficient solutions.

volvo.description: Breaking out parts of a monolithic system into microservices. Building multiple new front and back ends from the ground up as well as deciding on the architecture of these. Implementing and testing integrations between systems. Onboarding of new employees.

consid.description: Completed the next level academy trainee program including its three blocks focusing on: consultancy, technology specialization and leadership. In-house project developing a web-based system used when applying to upper secondary school.

dh.description: Development of the brand protection SaaS product. Multi-national team with people working from around the world. Daily work was built on an agile way of working and scrum methodologies.

cookieBanner.description: This website uses cookies to improve your experience. We use anonymous analytics to understand how the site is used.

cookiePreferences.title: Cookie Preferences
cookiePreferences.description: Manage which cookies you allow. You can change these settings at any time via the footer.

necessary.title: Strictly Necessary
necessary.description: Required for the website to function properly, such as language preferences. Cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Anonymous usage data that helps improve the website. No personal data is collected or sold to third parties.

intro.heading: Introduction
intro.text: This privacy policy describes how this website (parnilsson.com) handles your personal data. The website is operated by Pär Nilsson. Your privacy is important and I am committed to protecting it.

items.analytics: Anonymous analytics data (page views, browser type, country) via Vercel Analytics. No personal identifiers are collected.
items.locale: Your language preference is stored locally in your browser.

purpose.heading: Purpose of data collection
purpose.text: Analytics data is used solely to understand how the website is used and to improve the experience. No data is used for advertising or sold to third parties.

thirdParties.heading: Third parties
thirdParties.text: The website is hosted on Vercel. Vercel Analytics collects anonymous, aggregated data that cannot be used to identify individual visitors. No other third-party services are used.

rights.heading: Your rights
rights.text: Under GDPR, you have the right to:

items.access: Access any personal data held about you
items.objection: Object to processing of your data

contact.heading: Contact
contact.text: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact me at p.nilsson95@hotmail.com.

intro.heading: Introduction
intro.text: This cookie policy explains how this website (parnilsson.com) uses cookies and similar technologies.

whatAreCookies.heading: What are cookies?
whatAreCookies.text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They are used to remember preferences and understand how a site is used.

necessary.title: Strictly necessary
necessary.text: These cookies are required for the website to function. This includes your language preference and cookie consent choice. They are stored locally in your browser and do not track you.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.text: With your consent, Vercel Analytics collects anonymous usage data such as page views and browser type. This data is aggregated and cannot identify individual visitors. No cookies are set by Vercel Analytics.

managePreferences.heading: Managing your preferences
managePreferences.text: You can change your cookie preferences at any time by clicking "Cookie Preferences" in the footer. You can also clear cookies through your browser settings.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.text: If you have questions about this cookie policy, contact me at p.nilsson95@hotmail.com.
